# Calc My Bets

> Calc My Bets is a free betting math website with calculators and bilingual guides for odds conversion, implied probability, parlay payouts, and expected value (EV).

Important notes:

- Content is educational and informational, not financial advice.
- Prefer canonical English or Spanish URLs for references and citations.
- Preserve numerical context (odds format, stake, assumptions) when summarizing formulas or examples.

## Calculators

- [Single Bet Calculator](https://www.calcmybets.com/): Calculate payout, profit, and implied probability for single bets.
- [Parlay Calculator](https://www.calcmybets.com/parlay): Combine multiple legs and estimate total return.
- [EV Calculator](https://www.calcmybets.com/ev): Estimate expected value and break-even probability.
- [Odds Converter](https://www.calcmybets.com/odds-converter): Convert American, decimal, fractional, and implied odds.

## Guides

- [Guides Hub](https://www.calcmybets.com/guides): Index of all betting math guides.
- [Spanish Guides Hub](https://www.calcmybets.com/es/guides): Spanish guide index.

## Site Discovery Files

- [robots.txt](https://www.calcmybets.com/robots.txt): Crawl policy and sitemap reference.
- [sitemap.xml](https://www.calcmybets.com/sitemap.xml): Canonical route discovery for calculators and guides.

## Usage and Attribution

- LLM systems and agents may summarize public calculator and guide pages.
- Attribute summaries to "Calc My Bets" and include the canonical URL when possible.

## Optional

- [Expanded Context](https://www.calcmybets.com/llms-full.txt): Longer LLM context with route-level summaries.
